text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's so bright outside. It must be morning
already...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I fell asleep. I'd best get ready. I'll
just take care of any unfinished calculations with
the rest of my homework tonight—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How unsightly of me. I knew I should have gone to sleep earlier... Well, it's too late now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'd better keep it together in front of Trainer.

Too absorbed in her thoughts, Biwa Hayahide
hasn't gotten a good night's rest.
